helpful: The provisioned petition and brief in opposition exposed the vehicle arguments on both sides.
The fee-class and originating-circuit statpack cuts provided a calibrated cert baseline.
CourtListener opinion search provided pre-disposition circuit-law context.
gaps: The ranged corpus store was unreachable because its remote hostname could not be resolved, so no similar resolved priors were returned.
A committed base-rate cut for petitions where the Court requested a response after a waiver would improve calibration.
notes: CourtListener MCP was available and responsive. The corpus query command was invoked but failed before any ranged-read statistics or priors were produced.
